status_notes: Source-level entries only, no article subpaths. meti.go.jp returned HTTP 403 to every automated fetch attempted during research (2026-07-16), including plain HTML pages — appears to be domain-wide bot/WAF protection, not a genuine block on humans.
official_name: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry, Japan
notes: See also registry/control/jp/go/meti.json for METI's guideline-type publications (Cybersecurity Management Guidelines, AI Business Guidelines, supply-chain guidance) under the same namespace.

match_nodes.description: Unfair Competition Prevention Act — Japan's primary trade-secret protection statute

data.notes: Act No. 47 of 1993 (as amended). 9 chapters, 40 articles: I General Provisions (Arts. 1-2, incl. trade-secret definition), II Injunctions/Damages (3-15), III International-Agreement Prohibited Acts (16-18), IV Miscellaneous (19-20), V Penal Provisions (21-22, criminal trade-secret theft up to 10 years/JPY20M fine), VI Criminal Procedure Special Provisions (23-31), VII Confiscation Procedures (32-34), VIII Preservation Proceedings (35-36), IX International Mutual Legal Assistance (37-40). The primary civil/criminal statute for trade-secret theft — covers unauthorized acquisition/use/disclosure of confidential business/technical information, directly relevant to insider exfiltration and industrial-espionage cyber incidents.

urls.note: Returned HTTP 403 to automated fetch as of 2026-07-16.
WIPO Lex mirror; fetched but content wasn't text-extractable in this pass.

match_nodes.description: Installment Sales Act — credit card number protection provisions

data.notes: Act No. 159 of 1961 (last amended Act No. 64 of 2020). Chapter III-4 'Proper Management of Credit Card Numbers' (Arts. 35-16 to ~35-17-15) mandates merchants/acquirers manage and protect card-number data — Japan's statutory basis (alongside PCI DSS industry self-regulation) for mandatory credit-card-number security management, directly relevant to payment-card-data breach prevention.

urls.note: Returned HTTP 403 to automated fetch as of 2026-07-16.
